queries.question: List all sommeliers with the first name of Alex and all bartenders with first name of Alex
queries.sql:
SELECT Professionals.FullName
FROM Professionals
WHERE (Professionals.Position = "Sommelier" OR Professionals.Position = "Bartender") AND Professionals.FullName LIKE "Alex %"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?professionals a :Professionals .
  ?professionals p:name ?fullname .
  ?professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?professionals p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Sommelier" || STR(?position_w2) = "Bartender")) && REGEX(STR(?fullname_w), "^Alex\\ .*$")))
}

queries.question: Show me all sommeliers and bartenders called Alex
queries.sql:
SELECT Professionals.FullName
FROM Professionals
WHERE Professionals.Position = "Sommelier" OR Professionals.Position = "Bartender" AND Professionals.FullName LIKE "Alex %"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?professionals a :Professionals .
  ?professionals p:name ?fullname .
  ?professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?professionals p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Sommelier" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Bartender" && REGEX(STR(?fullname_w), "^Alex\\ .*$"))))
}
